description: Generate a publication-quality scientific schematic from a natural-language description using the OpenRouter image API, with smart iterative quality refinement keyed to the target document type.
rules: requires OPENROUTER_API_KEY and network access — calls the OpenRouter LLM image service
iterations are clamped to a maximum of 2 by the core
rendered image written to record_store as schematic.png
usage: Set PROMPT (the diagram description). Optionally set DOC_TYPE (journal|conference|poster|presentation|report|grant|thesis|preprint|default) and ITERATIONS (1-2). Requires OPENROUTER_API_KEY in env. Output: schematic.png.
limitation: Cannot run offline: needs OPENROUTER_API_KEY, network egress to OpenRouter, and the requests library. Without them the porter writes an empty marker and the contract's image output is not produced.
